name: exec
label: exec
description: Run TypeScript ESM code in a temporary Node.js module. Optional npm packages are installed before execution and can be imported by name.
Returns stdout and stderr only. Output is truncated to the last {{defaultMaxLines}} lines or {{defaultMaxBytes}}, whichever is hit first.
No programmatic Pi tool functions are available in this first version.
promptSnippet: Run TypeScript code with optional npm packages
promptGuidelines: Use exec when a task benefits from composing logic in code instead of making many small tool calls.
Print concise summaries to stdout/stderr; large output is truncated before it reaches the model.

packages.description: npm package specs to install and make importable by the code, for example ["yaml@2", "zod@4"].

code.description: TypeScript ESM code to run with Node.js. Top-level await and imports from requested packages are supported.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds. If omitted, defaults to {{defaultTimeout}}.
